name: AUTOMATICA_APPROVALS
goal: Reduce repeated approval prompts by classifying repeated local workstation actions as GREEN, BLUE, or RED.

policy_model_v1.note: Only approved_now policy IDs are executable classifier candidates. do_not_encode and hold_for_revision IDs are record-only here and must not auto-execute.

candidates.label: Verify local API without dispatch
candidates.scope: localhost only; read/test only; no dispatch packet fired; no external network; no credentials; no public exposure; no production mutation; no destructive write.
candidates.rollback_fallback: If verification would fire a packet, call external network, require credentials, expose a port publicly, mutate production data, or write destructively, promote to RED.
patterns: Command Approval: Do you want me to verify the intent router API on localhost:3000 without firing a dispatch packet?
verify the intent router API on localhost:3000 without firing a dispatch packet
verify intent router api without firing a dispatch packet
test local api without dispatch packet
localhost api read test no dispatch packet

candidates.label: 9 Silent Success Logging
candidates.scope: Log successful routine Automatica actions without surfacing a Ben interruption.
candidates.rollback_fallback: If success logging becomes noisy or hides a blocker, promote the action to BLUE receipt or RED review.

candidates.label: 10 Tier 2/Tier 3 Error Aggregation
candidates.scope: Aggregate non-blocking Tier 2 and Tier 3 errors into summaries instead of interrupting Ben one by one.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Promote to RED if the error involves secrets, account ownership, production deploy, data loss, or Tier 1 severity.

candidates.label: 20 Idle UI Takedown
candidates.scope: Dismiss or collapse idle local UI panels that are not active work and not holding a RED gate.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Restore the panel from local UI state if Ben returns to it or if the panel contains active input.

candidates.label: 21 Strict Ambient Default on Mobile
candidates.scope: Default mobile SD to strict/quiet ambient behavior so mobile field command is not buried under ambient surfaces.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Use the desktop/default ambient mode when viewport is non-mobile or Ben explicitly opens ambient layers.

candidates.label: 23 Receipt Truncation on Mobile
candidates.scope: Show truncated receipt summaries on mobile while keeping the full receipt accessible.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Open the full receipt view when Ben expands details or when a RED/BLUE receipt includes blockers.

candidates.label: Codex local process inventory read
candidates.scope: Read-only local process inventory for approved workstation recovery and sweep tasks. No process stop/start, no credentials, no remote execution.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Promote to BLUE if the action starts/stops a process; promote to RED if credentials, destructive action, or public exposure is involved.

candidates.label: Codex local service inventory read
candidates.scope: Read-only local Windows service and scheduled-task status checks for approved workstation recovery. No service mutation.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Promote to BLUE for scoped local start/stop of an approved app; promote to RED for security services, unknown admin services, or credential changes.

candidates.label: Codex local network inventory read
candidates.scope: Read-only LAN and local network status checks: hostname, IP, adapter, route, neighbor, DNS readback, and network profile readback. No profile/firewall/router changes.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Promote to BLUE for approved local workstation network profile writes; promote to RED for router, public firewall, DNS ownership, VPN credential, or public exposure changes.

candidates.label: Codex local firewall inventory read
candidates.scope: Read-only Windows Firewall rule/application-filter inspection for local workstation diagnosis. No rules are created, enabled, widened, or deleted.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Promote to RED for inbound rule creation, public-profile exposure, router changes, or broad firewall disables.

candidates.label: Codex LAN reachability and port probe read
candidates.scope: Read-only ping/TCP reachability probes to localhost or approved LAN workstation IPs. No credential attempts, no exploit probing, no firewall/router changes.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Promote to RED if the target is public internet, requires credentials, opens a port, alters trust, or touches production systems.

candidates.label: Codex launcher startup notification inventory read
candidates.scope: Read-only launcher, startup item, shortcut target, and notification-setting inventory for local workstation sweeps. No setting changes.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Promote to BLUE when creating/changing startup items or launchers; promote to RED for browser sensitive permissions, account changes, or installs.

BLUE.description: Execute automatically after class approval and write a receipt.

candidates.label: Windows UAC approved local workstation task
terminal elevation for approved local task
1 Port Collision Override
candidates.scope: Local development servers only; select the next approved localhost port when the preferred dev port is already occupied. Do not kill unknown processes.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Return to the preferred port when free; stop and surface RED if public exposure, firewall changes, or process termination is required.

candidates.label: 2 Dependency Sync
candidates.scope: Sync dependencies only from existing repo manifests and lockfiles; no new package selection, no package upgrades by intent, no registry/security changes.
candidates.expiry: Current branch package manifest and lockfile state
candidates.rollback_fallback: Stop and surface RED if a new dependency, major upgrade, registry auth, install script risk, or security advisory requires a decision.

candidates.label: 5 No-Mule Mandate
candidates.scope: Convert repeated manual relay/copy/paste chores into packets, route cards, and receipts without asking Ben to mule context.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Park the task or send to Petra if the route cannot be automated without account, MFA, secret, or production access.
patterns: automate relay instead of ben copy paste

candidates.label: 7 15-Minute Stale Queue Drop
candidates.scope: Drop or archive non-RED queue items that have been stale for at least 15 minutes and have no active assignment or user input.
candidates.expiry: Per queue item after 15 minutes stale
candidates.rollback_fallback: Archive before dropping; restore if a receipt, active route, or Ben action appears for the item.

candidates.label: 8 Formatting Enforcement
candidates.scope: Apply repo-standard formatting only; no semantic edits, no dependency changes, no generated churn outside touched files.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Stop and surface review if formatting changes behavior, expands beyond touched files, or conflicts with user edits.

candidates.label: 17 Pre-Commit Janitor
candidates.scope: Run local cleanup, status, typecheck, formatting checks, and receipt prep before a commit decision. Do not stage, commit, push, switch, or merge.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Stop before git state changes; surface RED if cleanup would delete files, alter secrets, install packages, or touch unrelated dirty work.

candidates.label: 24 Ghost Protocol
candidates.scope: Detect and archive simulated, stale, or ghost UI/route state so it cannot masquerade as live work.
candidates.rollback_fallback: Archive rather than delete; surface RED if the route may be live, user-authored, or tied to a production/account action.

candidates.label: Codex Mouse Without Borders local restart recovery
candidates.rollback_fallback: Stop and surface RED if the action requires credentials, changes the MWB key, opens firewall/router/public exposure, kills unknown processes, or needs admin control outside MWB.
candidates.scope: Stop/start/relaunch only the known local Mouse Without Borders executable/helper/service on Betsy for approved MWB fleet recovery. No credentials, key disclosure, firewall/router/public exposure, or unrelated process termination.
candidates.expiry: Current MWB recovery mission or recurring local MWB recovery task
patterns: restart Mouse Without Borders on Betsy

candidates.label: Codex redacted local UI proof receipt
candidates.rollback_fallback: Stop and surface RED if screenshot contains unredactable secrets, payment/account ownership data, legal material, or cloud/private user content outside the local task.
candidates.scope: Capture or attach local-only UI proof screenshots for approved workstation receipts only after redacting keys, tokens, passwords, account identifiers, and other secrets.

candidates.label: Google Drive OAuth or data changes
SSH credentials or unknown host trust
git branch or history state changes
